message:
Merge PR #2785: fix: auto-upgrade stale Gemini hook files on agent startup

Replace stale hook files containing 'export PATH=' pattern with current
templates using {{GT_BIN}} absolute paths, fixing Gemini CLI compatibility.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2785
Author: seanbearden

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
